scripts.lint: npm run lint-js && npm run lint-php && npm run lint-plugin
scripts.lint-plugin: wp-env run cli wp plugin check wp-content/plugins/orejime-wordpress-plugin --require=./wp-content/plugins/plugin-check/cli.php --require=./wp-content/plugins/orejime-wordpress-plugin/tests/pcp.php --slug=orejime
scripts.format: npm run format-js && npm run format-php
